candidate_problem_record.subject: math
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Since $\triangle ABC\cong \triangle ADE$, and $\angle D=30^\circ$,\\
it follows that $\angle B=\angle D=30^\circ$,\\
Since $\angle C=70^\circ$,\\
then $\angle BAC=180^\circ-\angle B-\angle C=180^\circ-70^\circ-30^\circ=80^\circ$,\\
Since $\triangle ABC\cong \triangle ADE$,\\
it follows that $\angle EAD=\angle BAC=80^\circ$,\\
Also, given that $\angle CAD=35^\circ$,\\
then $\angle EAC=\angle EAD-\angle DAC=80^\circ-35^\circ=45^\circ$,\\
Thus, the answer is: $\boxed{B}$.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集被视为具备较稳定的多解潜力，可进入更强的多解挖掘链路。
